headline: Trump's Gaza committee remains an empty shell paralyzed by Israel
description: Created four months ago as part of Donald Trump's peace plan, the entity is supposed to manage the coastal territory in place of Hamas. But Israel is preventing its members from entering, leaving them stranded in their offices in Cairo.

Morocco faces over 40,000 job losses after France bans telemarketing calls
description: A law passed in France bans all prospecting calls without the customer's explicit consent starting August 11. The move endangers tens of thousands of employees in Moroccan call centers, which are heavily dependent on the French market.

headline: How France's early heatwave is affecting plants and wildlife
description: Birds that nest under rooftops, such as swifts and swallows, are particularly at risk during heatwaves. This unprecedented spell is taking place right in the middle of the nesting season, but it is not accompanied by drought conditions.

headline: Second seed Rybakina dumped out of French Open by Starodubtseva
description: It is Australian Open champion Elena Rybakina's earliest exit from any WTA tournament since the 2025 Miami Open.

headline: At Versailles, Louis XVI's private chamber is recreated after 40 years of twists and turns
description: Reconstructed from a single fabric sample and written archives, the recreation of the room and bed where the king slept alone went through its share of extraordinary episodes before finally coming to fruition.

headline: How China uses influencers to polish its image
description: Chongqing, a futuristic Chinese city, has caught the eye of influencers and bloggers. Beijing, meanwhile, welcomes new visitors, often unaware of the geopolitical and ideological currents running beneath their social media posts.

headline: Trump seeks deal to neutralize Iran's highly enriched uranium stockpile
description: The US president claims he can secure a better deal than the 2015 agreement signed by Barack Obama, but Tehran is refusing to grant Washington even a symbolic victory on the issue.
